title: Upcoming events and products - Canada.ca
content:
## Upcoming events and products

## Free webinar on taxable and non-taxable automobile benefits, allowances or reimbursement
The Canada Revenue Agency (CRA) is hosting a free webinar to help employers better understand their obligations when providing automobile benefits (allowances or reimbursement) to their employees. Topics to be discussed in the webinar include:
- Definitions and key terms
- Employer-provided vehicle benefits
- Employee-owned vehicle allowances
- Reporting and compliance requirements

### This webinar is for you if you are:
- An employer who provides automobile benefits
- An employer who provides allowances or reimbursements to an employee for the use their own vehicle
The webinar is on Wednesday, March 25, 2026 , at the following times:
English Register now
Questions may be submitted from time of registration until the end of the webinar. While the webinar is live, our goal is to answer as many questions as possible.

## Need more information?
You can also watch previous recorded webinars for businesses in our businesses video gallery on canada.ca.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
